questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = 'a5a6c692-df74-429b-a824-495945596f05' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = 'f76b339d-cd78-4602-9258-72fce8972ad6'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = 'a5a6c692-df74-429b-a824-495945596f05'; delete from question_items where id = 'a5a6c692-df74-429b-a824-495945596f05';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
